General.Name: Deezer S.A.
General.Description: Deezer S.A. provides music, lossless HiFi audio, and industry defining features on a scalable platform in France, Germany, the United Kingdom, Brazil, the United States, and internationally. The company operates through Direct, Partnerships, and Other segments. It also offers advertising services, as well as streams songs, live radio, and podcasts. The company is based in Paris, France.
